title: Discriminated Unions, Exhaustiveness, and Result Models · Contract Lens: Pattern Evolution
summary: Replace boolean status flags and ambiguous errors with explicit request, success, failure, and cancellation states. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts pattern evolution increment in an exhaustive asynchronous state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Add, deprecate, and migrate variants with compatibility tests and consumer impact evidence.
Constrain legal state transitions and outputs without permitting impossible intermediate combinations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
